reviews.review_description:
I am a big fan of this genre, so I was thrilled to find this app. After finishing Level 1, I have two specific requests for improvement.

#1 VIEW ALIGNMENT: The board view is slightly offset to the left. Even after using the Meta Quest centering feature, I still feel like I am viewing the board from an angle. I would like to play directly from the front, so please look into this.

#2 SOUND EFFECTS: The audio when connecting lines feels unnatural. The sound triggers from the far left or right, which is disjointed from the visual action. Please check the spatial audio settings.

I also look forward to more levels in the future. Thank you for your hard work!
